The first row behaviour should be the one in every row

The sorting logic prioritizes completed items first, then those with transcripts, then waiting ones. This ordering ensures the UI reflects the progression through different states.

I've fixed the spinner size inconsistency. The metric column spinners were `w-4 h-4` (smaller) while the first column spinners were `w-5 h-5`. Now all spinners are consistently `w-5 h-5`.

The spinner visibility logic is correct - it checks `!simulation.evaluation_results` to determine when to show spinners, so they should remain visible until the metrics are retrieved. The spinners will:
- Show gray (`text-gray-500`) when waiting (no transcript yet)
- Show yellow (`text-yellow-500`) when processing (has transcript but no evaluation results yet)
- Disappear only when evaluation results are available

```diff
@@ -2014,4 +2014,5 @@
  - **Do NOT use &#96;bg-popover&#96;** - it causes transparent backgrounds due to Tailwind v4 theme mapping issues; use &#96;bg-background&#96; instead for dropdowns and popovers
  - **Checkboxes need visible borders**: Use &#96;border-muted-foreground&#96; (not &#96;border-border&#96;) and &#96;border-2&#96; for custom checkbox buttons to ensure visibility in both light and dark modes
+ - **Spinners in flex containers**: Always add &#96;flex-shrink-0&#96; to spinner SVGs to prevent them from shrinking. Standard spinner class: &#96;w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0 animate-spin&#96;
  
  ### Forms
```

</details>

</tool-use>
